extraction.one_line_summary: RODRIGUEZ Carlos soloed to victory on descent to Morzine while POGAČAR took 2nd place bonus to cut VINGEGAARD's GC lead to 10 seconds
tactical_patterns: UAE sent YATES Adam back to pace POGAČAR in final kilometer, sacrificing teammate GC position for leader's bonus seconds.
RODRIGUEZ attacked on descent after Joux Plane summit, taking 10-second win bonus while GC contenders marked each other.
POGAČAR sprinted early for 6-second bonus with VINGEGAARD forced to follow, revealing UAE prioritizes time gaps over stage wins.
VINGEGAARD's team rode tempo all day to control break, showing Jumbo-Visma defending rather than attacking with slim lead.

rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: positive: 22-year-old Tour rookie won solo after descending away from GC group, now third overall
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: fought for every bonus second available, reduced gap to 10 seconds despite not winning stage
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: dropped back from podium positions to pace POGAČAR in finale, clear domestique role despite high GC
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: only gained one second overall on huge mountain stage, forced into defensive racing for bonus seconds
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: negative: lost polka dot jersey on tiebreaker to VINGEGAARD despite matching points, indicating missed intermediate opportunities
